unwired_edge_functions.name: intelligence-briefing
unwired_edge_functions.reason: No supabase.functions.invoke call found in src/. Intelligence Hub uses useIntelligence.ts direct Supabase instead.
unwired_edge_functions.recommendation: Wire to /intelligence or formally deprecate. Maps to INTEL-WO-01.

unwired_edge_functions.name: refresh-live-data
unwired_edge_functions.reason: No supabase.functions.invoke call found in src/. live_data_feeds table has no consuming TanStack hook.
unwired_edge_functions.recommendation: Wire to Admin Hub feeds dashboard or confirm as cron-only.

unwired_edge_functions.name: ingest-npi
unwired_edge_functions.reason: No supabase.functions.invoke call found in src/. NPI verification requires explicit business_id POST body — no frontend trigger path exists.
unwired_edge_functions.recommendation: Wire to business portal onboarding or settings NPI verification panel. HIGH priority for operator trust.

unwired_edge_functions.name: ingest-openfda
unwired_edge_functions.reason: No supabase.functions.invoke call found in src/ and no pg_cron migration found for this function. Safety signals need ongoing refresh.
unwired_edge_functions.recommendation: Add pg_cron schedule migration. Optionally add manual trigger in Admin Hub feeds page.

blocked_edge_functions.name: square-oauth-callback
blocked_edge_functions.block_reason: W11-13 — tokens must use Supabase Vault before deployment

blocked_edge_functions.name: square-appointments-sync
blocked_edge_functions.block_reason: W11-13 — tokens must use Supabase Vault before deployment

duplicate_webhook_handlers.risk: Both handle Stripe subscription lifecycle events and write to subscriptions + user_profiles. If both registered in Stripe Dashboard, double-write on same event is possible.
duplicate_webhook_handlers.recommendation: Audit Stripe Dashboard Webhook registrations. Consolidate to one handler.

raw_useeffect_violations_notes: useEnrichment.ts useEffect calls scheduleEnrichment() (not supabase.from() directly). The supabase.from() calls on lines 91-93 are inside a useQuery queryFn — fully compliant. useIngredients/useIngredientSearch useEffects are debounce timers only. useIntelligence/useSubscription/useShopCart useEffects are Realtime channel subscriptions — acceptable pattern. Net confirmed violations in lib/: 0.
raw_useeffect_violations_in_pages: src/pages/sales/OpportunityFinder.tsx:77 — market_signals direct read (bypasses tier gate)
src/pages/brand/Products.tsx:110-566 — product_pricing, pro_products, retail_products direct CRUD
src/pages/brand/Dashboard.tsx:174-192 — orders, pro_products, brands direct reads
src/pages/sales/ProposalView.tsx:43-65 — proposals direct (useProposals hook exists but not used here)
392 total instances across 100+ files — admin pages lower priority; brand/business pages P1; tier-bypass reads P0

database_types_drift.description: database.types.ts covers ~116 tables; 165+ migrations exist. New tables (feed_dlq, feed_run_log, crm_consent_log, signal_alerts, etc.) are untyped.
database_types_drift.fix: Run: supabase gen types typescript --project-id <id> > src/lib/database.types.ts

failures: GAP-01: intelligence-briefing edge function deployed but no frontend wiring (no invoke found in src/)
GAP-02: refresh-live-data edge function deployed but no frontend wiring and no confirmed cron
GAP-03: ingest-npi deployed but no frontend trigger — operators cannot trigger NPI verification
GAP-04: ingest-openfda deployed but no pg_cron schedule and no frontend trigger — safety signals not refreshing automatically
GAP-05: stripe-webhook and subscription-webhook are potential duplicate handlers — double-write risk on subscription events

GAP-06: 14 tables have no consuming TanStack hook (feed_dlq, feed_run_log, live_data_feeds, api_registry, brand_intelligence_report_jobs, brand_automation_rules, crm_consent_log, crm_churn_risk, sales_signal_attribution, cms_versions, block_data_bindings, market_stats, square_connections, square_appointments_cache)
GAP-07: 392 raw supabase.from() calls in pages/ — 2 confirmed tier-bypass reads (OpportunityFinder:77 market_signals, CECreditDashboard:80 market_signals); 100+ files need migration to TanStack hooks
GAP-08: 7 stub hooks with useQuery:0 (useSignalModules, useProtocols, useSignalCategories, useEducation, useEnrollments, useSalesPlaybooks, useShopOrders, useShopProducts, useShopReviews)
DEBT-P0-5: database.types.ts drift — ~116 tables typed vs 165+ migrations
DEBT-HOOKS: 7 duplicate hook pairs in src/lib/ — consolidation required (hook-consolidator skill)
corrections_vs_v1: CORRECTED: useEnrichment.ts was incorrectly flagged as raw useEffect + supabase.from() — the supabase.from() calls are inside a useQuery queryFn. Net lib/ violations = 0.
CORRECTED: edge_functions_total was 35 in v1 — actual count is 34 (test-api-connection was listed twice in prior inventory).
ADDED: 392 raw supabase.from() in pages/ — this is a large wiring gap not captured in v1.
